emails.subject: Bill of Sale
emails.body: Kay: Here is the information required for the Bill of Sale exhibit. Let me know if any additional information is needed and I will coordinate with Chris Booth and Rebecca Walker. I will draft an exhibit with this information in a Word document as the formal attachment. Does the Bill of Sale document require 2 separate exhibits (similar to the notice of option exhibits) or can all the information be shown on one exhibit? Let me know. Fred

emails.subject: Re: Bill of Sale
emails.body: Re: Bill of Sale I think it is two separate documents, one for each purchaser (CAED I and CAED II). ckm Fred Mitro@ECT 01/03/2001 11:32 AM
